name: collab-toolkit
description: Read-only office-collab toolkit (Asana / Slack / Notion / Google Calendar / Gmail) over official channels — MCP servers for Asana/Slack/Notion + Google Workspace CLI (gws) for Gmail/GCal. Locale-independent. ⚠️ Claude Code CLI only — Cowork sandbox not supported.

oauth.scopes: search:read.public search:read.private search:read.mpim search:read.im search:read.files files:read emoji:read search:read.users channels:history groups:history mpim:history im:history channels:read groups:read mpim:read users:read users:read.email
